hero.title: A place to honour those we've loved
hero.sub: Because every paw print leaves a mark on the heart. Create a lasting memorial and share the story of your beloved companion.

quote.text: Until one has loved an animal, a part of one's soul remains unawakened.

candles.label: Light a candle
candles.title: Keep their light burning
candles.sub: Light a virtual candle in memory of a beloved pet and let their spirit glow.

how.label: Getting started
how.title: How it works
how.step1_desc: Fill in your pet's name, dates, breed, and upload your favourite photos to build their personal page.
how.step2_desc: Write a heartfelt tribute, add special memories, and let the world know just how wonderful they were.
how.step3_desc: Share a unique link so friends and family can leave messages, light candles, and pay their respects.
how.step4_desc: Receive anniversary reminders and keep their memory alive — for as long as you need.

modal.title: Create a Memorial
modal.sub: Celebrate the life of your beloved companion.
modal.name: Pet's Name
modal.tribute_ph: Share a favourite memory or what made them so special…
